RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0033 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Grace Dubois Date of Birth: 16/10/1984 SSN (tokenized): TKN-151146 Annual Income: $63,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $43,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Berlin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN78875AL Ford F-150 2019 Hybrid CPO 54,000 VIN55468AL Tesla 320i 2017 Hybrid Used 25,000 Authorized Signature: Grace Dubois
